title: conyza coronipifolia
intro: Conyza coronipifolia, also known as White Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Conyza coronipifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
